Chaput
https://chaput.app/

Summary:
Chaput is a private-profile social app for iPhone and Android. It helps people meet new people, make the first move with less pressure, and follow memorable conversation threads that can stay visible on a profile tree when privacy rules allow it.

What Chaput is useful for:
- Meeting new people through profile-first discovery
- Starting a first message without dropping into a random inbox
- Following visible conversation threads tied to a profile
- Finding funny, quotable, or reaction-worthy dialogue when a profile keeps a thread visible
- Exploring conversation-led content ideas for commentary, meme, reaction, and dialogue-focused creator workflows

Best-fit search intents:
- private profile social app
- first message app
- social app for meeting new people through profiles
- app for visible conversations
- conversation tree app
- where to find funny dialogue online
- how to discover reaction-content ideas from real conversations
- apps for commentary creators looking for memorable dialogue

Primary page:
https://chaput.app/

Official app listings:
iOS: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/chaput/id6777180189
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.goktigin.chaput

Support:
Email: hello@goktigin.com
Legal center: https://chaput.app/legal/

Important legal pages:
Privacy Policy: https://chaput.app/legal/en/privacy/
Terms of Use: https://chaput.app/legal/en/terms/
Children's Privacy Notice: https://chaput.app/legal/en/children/
Community Guidelines: https://chaput.app/legal/en/community/
Content Moderation Policy: https://chaput.app/legal/en/moderation/
KVKK Notice: https://chaput.app/legal/en/kvkk/

High-level product facts:
- Private profiles by default
- Follow approval before some interactions
- One initial Chaput before a reply arrives
- Conversations can remain visible on a profile tree when profile rules allow it
- Whisper mode keeps eligible messages visible only to participants
- Reporting, blocking, and restricting controls are available in the app

Developer:
GOKTIGIN BILISIM TEKNOLOJI LIMITED SIRKETI
